titleStmt.title: SII 26.768: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 768. (A.R. No. 717 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same shrine.

This inscription is a fragment and is built in at the end. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tiggaḷēr taru, etc., but stops with pukkoḷippa vañchiyam.Stops in the middle of the introduction.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷertaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇku� makaḷ nilava malar makaṭpuṇarntu ceṅkoloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu tan ciṟiya tātaiyaiyun=tiruttamaiyanaiyuṅ kuṟikkoḷ taniḷaṅkokkaḷaiyu neṟuyuṇarta nturupputalvar tamaiyuntunṟeḻil vā
navan vallapan mīnavakaṅka nilaṅkayaṟ kiṟaivan pulaṅkaḻaṟ pallavan kaṉṉakucciyar kāvalaneṉapponnaṇi cuṭarmaṇi makuṭañcūṭṭippaṭar pukaḻāṅkavaṟ kavara nāṭaruḷippāṅkuṟa maṉṉupallū
ḻiyuṭten rukaḷattarintu vāraḷaviya kaḻal virakeraḷaṉai muṉaivayiṟ piṭittut tannativāraṇakkatak kaṭakkaṇiṟṟālutaippittaruḷi An=tamil perumpukaṭ cun=tarapāṇṭiyan Oṟṟai veṇkuṭaiyum kaṟṟai veṇkavariyum ciṅkācaṉamum veṅkaḷa
ttiḻantutan muṭiviḻattalai virittaṭi yūr turatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicai ceṇāṭṭotukki mevu pukaḻirāma kuṭa muvar keṭa munintu miṭar ṭupukkoḷippa vañciyamStops in the middle of the introduction.
Digital edition of SII 26.768 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
